about_page.title_seo: Introducing Medpro - The most widely used healthcare app.
about_page.description_seo: Learn more about Medpro, a pioneering application that connects users with healthcare services. It simplifies the process of accessing medical care, receiving treatment, and getting health consultations.
about_page.title: Introduction
about_page.description: This app allows patients and their families to complete the online appointment registration process with hospitals anytime, anywhere, without the need to visit the hospital in person.

home.title_seo: Medpro - Book appointments quickly at over 100 hospitals, over 1000 clinics, and medical practices.
home.description_seo: A digital healthcare platform trusted by 4 million users, 100+ hospitals, and 1,000+ clinics and private practices. A comprehensive appointment booking solution available via hotline 19002115, website, mobile app, and social media channels.
